title: Battle at Atzerri

{{Quote|My inquiries into this Imperial superweapon have put us in a dangerous situation. A pirate associate of ours has gone rogue, offering to sell information on the Alliance to Imperial command.|[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]|<ref name="EaW" />}}
A '''skirmish''' occurred at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in which a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] contact of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] attempted to sell important Rebel military information to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Prelude==
{{Quote|That's what we get for dealing with those slimeballs. Those pirates would sell their own mothers out for a few credits!|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]]|<ref name="EaW" />}}
The pirate, in his personal [[Interceptor-class frigate/Legends|Interceptor frigate]], fled to [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]], where he was to rendezvous with an Imperial fleet in the system. The Imperials decided to get the information from him without pay in a violent manner. They forced the pirate to surrender himself and prepare to be boarded.

==The battle==
{{Quote|He has arranged a meeting with the Imperials near Atzerri. We must intercept that pirate before he can transfer the detailed information of our bases to the Empire.|Mon Mothma|<ref name="EaW" />}}
The [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] entered the system. The strategy was for the larger warships to draw enemy fire, while squads of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] opened fire on the Action VI transport with their [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], allowing [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]] and a squad of soldiers to board.

The two fleets exchanged fire. A squadron of four [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruisers]] were activated, preventing the contact from escaping.

A team of Y-wings did their job of disabling the transport. Immobilized, the [[Sundered Heart/Legends|''Sundered Heart'']] attached to the warship and Captain Antilles and a team of [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel soldiers]] boarded. They apprehended the traitor.

The fleet prepared to jump [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] with the criminal, but the Immobilizers remained active. Raymus led a team of Y-wings to bomb the starships. The squad of Immobilizers were destroyed, allowing the Rebels to jump to hyperspace with the hostage.

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|The captured pirate has divulged information he's gathered on this superweapon project. Grand Moff Tarkin is overseeing that project personally. We know where Tarkin was conducting research, but we risk a frontal assault on a fortified Imperial station.|Mon Mothma|<ref name="EaW" />}}
The captured pirate eventually revealed informations about the Imperial [[Death Star/Legends|superweapon project]]. The Rebellion learnt that [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] was personally overseeing the project from a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] orbiting [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]. But before [[Raid over Corulag|attacking]] the station, the Rebels needed the [[Scanning in the Vergesso Asteroids|help]] of [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] who was [[Raid above Corellia|captured]] in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].

==Behind the scenes==
This battle was the sixth mission of the Rebel campaign in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''.

*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
